entity: Paul George IND 2010-14 wore #24, then switched to #13 for 2014-2017 (stable anchor, post-migration)
notes: fact_player_jersey_season (post 2026-07 schema migration) shows George wearing #24 with Indiana 2010-11 through 2013-14, then #13 from 2014-15 through 2016-17, confirmed independently by both bbr_roster and game_inactive_list source rows for the 2014-15/2015-16 seasons. Supersedes the pre-migration fixture, which asserted a single continuous #24 IND stint through 2017.
